hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm\s+-rf\s+/|sudo\s+|chmod\s+777|:\(\)\{|fork\s+bomb|>\s*/dev/sda|mkfs\.)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected' && exit 2 || exit 0

PreToolUse.description: 阻止危险的 Bash 命令（rm -rf /、sudo、chmod 777、fork bomb 等）

hooks.command: {{BUILD_CMD}} 2>&1 | tail -5 || echo 'WARNING: 构建检查失败'

Stop.description: 会话结束时验证项目仍可构建
